metadata.name: Open a Commercial Line of Credit

description: A corporate client needs to open a line of credit to manage working capital.

nodes.task_description: Gather the company's financial statements and application details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent collects all required documentation for underwriting.

nodes.task_description: Perform credit analysis and underwriting on the company.

expected_outcome.value: The credit risk department analyzes the company's financials and approves a credit line.

nodes.task_description: Generate loan documents and open the line of credit for the approved amount.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates the legal agreements and officially opens the credit facility.
